input.prompt: The shot starts on the failed setup from Scene 2 with space being cleared for the referenced product. Hands remove the blocking objects, wipe the surface, place the exact Ellie Lamps - HTTYD – Elie crafts product from the product reference image, rotate it toward the main use area, and switch it on or set it into working position. The shot ends with the referenced product centered, positioned, and ready for close detail in Scene 4. Use the exact product from the product reference image. Preserve its shape, silhouette, material, texture, color, proportions, and distinctive details. Do not redesign or replace it.
